Task: **Focus Area:** The Letter Hunt & Shape Sorting Safari!
*Note: Parents can update this section weekly to log activities (e.g., "Read 3 books", "Practiced tracing the letter G", "Sorted blocks by color").*
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Phonics - Hide 5 physical letters around the living room. Have Glory hunt for them and make their sound when found!
**Tuesday**: Math - Trace 3 big shapes (Circle, Square, Triangle) on paper. Have Glory sort her toys into the matching shapes.
**Wednesday**: Motor Skills - Practice using safety scissors to cut along a thick, straight line.
**Thursday**: Arts  - Finger painting! Focus on mixing two primary colors to make a secondary color.
**Friday**: Social - Practice taking turns building a block tower with Caleb or Elijah.
**Focus Area:** Independence & Daily Routines
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Lunchbox practice (opening/closing containers independently).
**Tuesday**: Sorting clothes by color/type into laundry bins.
**Wednesday**: 'School Morning' relay (putting on coat, zipping, and shoes).
**Thursday**: Practice washing hands properly while singing the ABCs.
**Friday**: Set the dinner table, counting plates and forks.
**Focus Area:** Name Recognition & Early Writing
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Trace the letters of her first name using playdough.
**Tuesday**: Hunt for the letters of her name in magazines and cut them out.
**Wednesday**: Write her name in a salt or sand tray.
**Thursday**: Finger paint her name on a large poster.
**Friday**: Practice holding a pencil with proper tripod grip to draw a self-portrait.
**Focus Area:** Numbers & Counting (1-10)
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday (Intro)**: Introduce numbers 1-10. Count 10 snacks into a bowl.
**Tuesday (Practice)**: Number hopscotch (jumping on chalk numbers 1-5).
**Wednesday (Building)**: Build a tower with exactly 10 blocks.
**Thursday (Review)**: Go on a nature walk and review counting: find 5 leaves and 5 rocks.
**Friday (Submission)**: Trace numbers 1-10 using a chunky crayon and show Mom/Dad.
**Focus Area:** Following Multi-Step Instructions
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Play 'Simon Says' combining two steps (e.g., touch nose, then jump).
**Tuesday**: Bake simple cookies (focus on measuring and waiting turns).
**Wednesday**: Mini obstacle course (e.g., jump over pillow, touch the wall).
**Thursday**: Draw a picture following 3 specific steps from Mom/Dad.
**Friday**: Pack her own activity bag for a car ride.
**Focus Area:** Shapes, Patterns & Measurement
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday (Intro)**: Introduce basic length measurement. Look at the `resources/weights_and_measures.md` guide and explore a ruler.
**Tuesday (Practice)**: Measure 3 toys using the ruler. Record which is longest.
**Wednesday (Building)**: Make an AB pattern (red, blue, red, blue) using blocks.
**Thursday (Review)**: Trace squares and triangles using the ruler.
**Friday (Submission)**: Cut out the shapes and glue them together to make a 'shape house' to hang on the fridge.
**Focus Area:** Social Skills & Sharing
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Role-play 'how to ask to join a game' with Caleb or Elijah.
**Tuesday**: Practice trading toys politely instead of grabbing.
**Wednesday**: Play a board game focusing on taking turns and losing gracefully.
**Thursday**: Read a book about feelings and practice making sad/happy/mad faces.
**Friday**: Draw a picture for someone else and practice saying 'Here you go'.
**Focus Area:** Rhyming & Phonics
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Sing rhyming songs (e.g., *Down by the Bay*).
**Tuesday**: Sort physical household items that start with 'A' and 'B'.
**Wednesday**: Play I-Spy with beginning sounds (I spy something starting with /sss/).
**Thursday**: Match upper and lowercase letters A-M (using cards or printed sheets).
**Friday**: Clap out the syllables of family members' names.
**Focus Area:** Scissor & Fine Motor Mastery
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Tweezer pickup (move cotton balls to a cup using tweezers or tongs).
**Tuesday**: Cut along curvy and zig-zag lines drawn on paper.
**Wednesday**: String large beads onto a thick shoelace.
**Thursday**: Peel and place small stickers onto specific targets on paper.
**Friday**: Squish and roll playdough into tiny balls using just thumb and index finger.
**Focus Area:** Numbers & Early Math
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Count out 20 pieces of cereal.
**Tuesday**: Sing a counting-to-20 song and jump on each number.
**Wednesday**: Sort 20 objects into two groups of 10.
**Thursday**: Trace the numbers 10, 11, and 12.
**Friday**: Play hide and seek (practice counting to 20 before looking).
**Focus Area:** Listening, Story Comprehension & World Exploration
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday (Intro)**: Look at the `resources/world_facts.md` guide. Pick one continent to focus on.
**Tuesday (Practice)**: Listen to a folk tale from that continent and identify the main character.
**Wednesday (Building)**: Retell the fairy tale using stuffed animals as props.
**Thursday (Review)**: Draw the ending of the story Mom/Dad read aloud.
**Friday (Submission)**: 'Show and Tell' - present your drawing and the continent you learned about to the family.
**Focus Area:** 'School Day' Dress Rehearsal!
Math: counting/shapes practice (5x/week)
Duolingo: 1 simple lesson (5x/week)
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
Piano: brief practice session (5x/week)
**Monday**: Practice raising hand and waiting to be called on during family time.
**Tuesday**: 'Carpet time' (sit 'criss-cross applesauce' and listen for 5 minutes).
**Wednesday**: Practice packing a backpack, putting it on, and unzipping it.
**Thursday**: Eat lunch from a lunchbox completely independently at the table.
**Friday**: Graduation day! Review the ABCs, count to 20, and get a special certificate.
